meaning: n.铅锤,铅弹adj.垂直的vt.使垂直,用铅增加重量,探测vi.垂直
examples: He was standing plumb in the middle of the road.
She learned to wire and plumb the house herself.
Other important construction tools include the plumb bob, the wrench, the rope and the chain.
But the ultimate challenge will be to see whether their vessel can plumb the ocean's deepest point.
